zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Normanville於大約1200年出生在英國英格蘭盧特藍德艾平加姆時，他的父親Ralph de Normanville34歲，母親Avicia26歲。他和Agnes of York至少有3個女兒。他去世於1241年在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾德包享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John de Normanville was born about 1200, in Empingham, Rutland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph de Normanville, was 34 and his mother, Avicia, was 26. He had at least 3 daughters with Agnes of York. He died in 1241, in Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Normanville est né environ 1200, à Empingham, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph de Normanville, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Avicia, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Agnes of York. Il est décédé en 1241, à Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Normanville um 1200 in Empingham, Rutland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Normanville 34 und seine Mutter Avicia 26. Er hatte mit Agnes of York mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1241 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Normanville è nato il circa 1200 nel Empingham, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph de Normanville, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Avicia, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Agnes of York. Morì nel 1241, nel Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Normanvilleが約1200年にイギリスイギリスルトランドエンパンガムで生まれた時，父Ralph de Normanvilleは34歳，母Aviciaは26歳であった。彼はAgnes of Yorkとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1241年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアジェドブルグで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Normanville(이)가 대략 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 핀그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Normanville(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Avicia(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Agnes of York(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1241년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 제드버그에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Normanville nasceu aproximadamente 1200, em Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph de Normanville, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Avicia, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Agnes of York. Ele faleceu em 1241, em Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Normanville родился около 1200 г. в местности эмпингхам, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph de Normanville было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Avicia, 26. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Agnes of York. Он умер в 1241 г. в местности джедбург, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Normanville nació aproximadamente 1200, en Empingham, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph de Normanville, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Avicia, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Agnes of York. Murió en 1241, en Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años.
